message:
fix(ci): make release signing optional when secret is absent

Skip fingerprint injection and artifact signing gracefully when
RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM is not configured, instead of failing
the entire release. Emits a warning annotation instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -252,10 +252,13 @@ jobs:
           cd release
 
           if [[ -z "${{ secrets.RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM }}" ]]; then
-            echo "::error::Missing RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM secret"
-            exit 1
+            echo "::warning::RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM secret not configured — skipping signing"
+            echo "SIGNING_AVAILABLE=false" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+            exit 0
           fi
 
+          echo "SIGNING_AVAILABLE=true" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
+
           key_file="$(mktemp)"
           trap 'rm -f "$key_file"' EXIT
           printf '%s\n' "${{ secrets.RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM }}" > "$key_file"
@@ -285,12 +288,13 @@ jobs:
           cat checksums.sha256
 
       - name: Sign release assets
+        if: env.SIGNING_AVAILABLE == 'true'
         run: |
           cd release
 
           if [[ -z "${{ secrets.RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM }}" ]]; then
-            echo "::error::Missing RELEASE_SIGNING_KEY_PEM secret"
-            exit 1
+            echo "::warning::Skipping signing — no key available"
+            exit 0
           fi
 
           key_file="$(mktemp)"
